name: @devx/cli
description: devx CLI — autonomous development system. Phase 0 surface area: scaffolded entrypoint + commander dispatch (cli301); 10 stubs + config command land in cli302/cfg204; --help annotations in cli303; --version + postinstall in cli304/cli305.
